text:
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance/Administrative-
Simplification/NationalProvIdentStand/ 

Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: While this field is new starting with the 2023 service year, the TAF data maintainer has disclosed that 
the field has been changed to a line level field in newer versions of the TAF source data. The data may 
not be accurate as currently configured at the header and
